posts.description:
Is your home ready for what summer actually looks like in Central Florida?

When school is out and the whole family is home all day, every worn floor, dated bathroom, and aging kitchen goes from background noise to front and center. Summer turns your home into the center of the universe. Kids moving between rooms, family gatherings, the AC running non-stop. That is when the gap between what your home is and what it could be becomes impossible to set aside.

Home renovation in Orlando peaks in summer for good reason. Your family lives inside more. The moment to act is now, not after the season passes.

At Kadosh Flooring Store, the team handles complete home renovation under one roof. No juggling five separate contractors. No coordination headaches. One licensed crew manages design, demolition, installation, and every finish detail from start to final clean-up.

Nine years. Over 600 Central Florida homes transformed. Written quote before any work begins. No surprises.

The team brings samples directly to your home. You see every option in your own light, against your own walls.

Call our Orlando office to schedule a free in-home design consultation. 🏡

Most bathroom remodels in Orlando fail before they start. Not because of budget. Because the homeowner hired three different contractors and no one took ownership of the whole job.

Bathroom remodeling is a sequence: demolition, plumbing rough-in, tile work, vanity install, fixtures, trim, final clean-up. When each step belongs to a different crew, delays compound and details fall through.

The team at Kadosh Flooring Store in Orlando handles bathroom remodeling under one roof. One licensed crew. Demolition to final grout clean-up. The in-house design team matches floor tile to shower walls to vanity top before a single piece of drywall comes down.

Nine years of bathroom renovations across Greater Orlando. Over 600 projects completed. Florida-code compliant for plumbing and structural changes.

If you have been putting off the bathroom because the process feels overwhelming, that is exactly the problem Kadosh solves. One crew. One written scope. One result that looks exactly as designed.

Call our Orlando office to book your free in-home consultation. 🚿

Homeowners in Orlando often choose tile based on what looks good in a store. Then it cracks. The grout darkens in six months. Or the installer quoted cheap tile and pocketed the difference.

Here is what separates a great porcelain tile job from one you will regret:

Tile grade matters. Residential, commercial, and exterior porcelain have different PEI ratings. The wrong grade in a high-traffic kitchen is a three-year decision, not a twenty-year one.

Subfloor preparation is non-negotiable. Porcelain cracks when the subfloor flexes. Leveling and moisture testing before installation is the step most contractors skip.

Grout selection changes the entire look. Sanded, unsanded, epoxy. Each behaves differently on large-format tile. Color choice affects maintenance for years.

At Kadosh Flooring Store in Orlando, the design team walks through every one of these decisions before a single tile is ordered. The licensed crew handles installation from start to finish across Greater Orlando, Lake Nona, Dr. Phillips, Winter Park, and Windermere.

Porcelain tile done right is a twenty-year decision. Call our Orlando office to get started. 🏡

The kitchen you have right now is not the kitchen your home deserves.

You know the one. Grout that will not come clean no matter what you use. A backsplash that looked fine years ago. Floors that show every scuff from daily family traffic.

Kitchen remodeling in Orlando does not have to mean six weeks of chaos and four different crews. At Kadosh Flooring Store, the team handles the complete kitchen transformation: tile floor installation, backsplash design and installation, finish work, trims, and all the details that turn a functional space into one you actually want to spend time in.

The in-house design team color-matches floors, backsplash tile, and countertop edges before anything is ordered. The licensed crew manages every step from demolition to final clean-up.

Nine years transforming Central Florida kitchens. Over 600 projects delivered. Written quote before any work begins.

Summer is the right time to start. Call our Orlando office to book your free in-home design consultation.

Have you ever seen solid hardwood floors buckle in a Florida home?

It is not rare. Central Florida's humidity swings are significant. A floor that looks perfect in February can cup, gap, or squeak by August if it was not selected and installed for this climate.

Engineered hardwood is built differently. A cross-ply core construction makes it dimensionally stable across humidity changes. The wear layer on top is real hardwood. It looks and feels identical to solid wood, is refinishable, and in Florida's climate performs in ways solid wood simply cannot.

At Kadosh Flooring Store in Orlando, the team acclimate every plank to your home's specific humidity before installation begins. The subfloor is leveled and moisture-tested. Trim lines are tight against every baseboard.

The result is a hardwood floor that moves with Florida's seasons, not against them.

Synchrony Bank financing is available. Written quote with no surprises. Kadosh serves Greater Orlando, Kissimmee, Oviedo, and Sanford.

Call our Orlando office to start your project. 🌿

Most homeowners in Orlando wait too long to remodel their bathroom.

They get used to the dark grout. The shower door that never closes right. The floor tile that has been cracked in the corner for two years. They tell themselves they will deal with it later. Later becomes years.

A primary bathroom remodel at Kadosh Flooring Store is a complete transformation: custom tile work, new fixtures, vanity install, shower redesign, and every finish detail handled by one licensed crew. No subcontractors. No coordination headaches.

The in-house design team helps select floor tile, wall tile, grout color, and fixture finish before demolition begins. 3D pre-demolition planning means the result looks exactly like what was agreed on.

Greater Orlando homeowners. Lake Nona. Dr. Phillips. Winter Park. Windermere. Clermont. The team travels to you first. The mobile showroom brings real tile samples to your home so you choose against your own light, your own existing fixtures.

Bathroom remodeling done right is a fifteen-year decision.

Call our Orlando office to book your free in-home consultation. ✨

Is your flooring surviving summer with the whole family home all day?

June in Central Florida means school is out, the AC runs non-stop, and every surface in your home gets tested. Floors especially.

Luxury vinyl plank is built for exactly this. Waterproof core. Scratch-resistant surface layer. Comfortable underfoot. Quiet when you walk on it. It handles wet paws, juice spills, dropped toys, and the daily traffic of a busy household without showing the evidence.

Modern LVP looks identical to wide-plank hardwood. The visual difference from across the room is zero. The performance difference over five years is significant.

At Kadosh Flooring Store in Orlando, the team levels the subfloor before any plank goes down. Most installers skip this step. It is why some vinyl floors start showing waves or gaps within months of installation. Kadosh finishes with tight baseboards and shoe molding so the result looks built-in, not laid down.

Families. Pet households. High-traffic living areas. This is the floor for your Central Florida life.

Call our Orlando office to schedule a free in-home estimate.

Most home renovation projects in Orlando fall apart at the handoff.

One contractor handles demolition. Another does plumbing. A third appears for tile. Nobody owns the outcome, so nobody catches the details that fall through.

The team at Kadosh Flooring Store in Orlando works differently. One licensed crew handles the complete renovation: demolition, plumbing rough-in, tile and flooring installation, baseboard and trim, and every finish detail. One point of contact. One written scope of work. One crew on-site from start to finish.

Before any wall comes down, the design team photographs and measures every surface. 3D pre-demolition planning eliminates surprises during construction. Daily site cleanups keep the home livable while work continues. Laser measurement tools mean every cut fits the first time.

Nine years operating in Greater Orlando. Florida-code compliant for electrical, plumbing, and structural work. Crews are licensed, insured, and background-checked.

Home renovation done this way produces results that last. And a process the family does not dread.

Call our Orlando office to schedule your free in-home consultation.

Have you stopped noticing how your kitchen actually looks?

It happens gradually. The tile starts looking dated. The backsplash blends into the background. The floors accumulate scuffs that mopping does not fix. Somewhere along the way, the kitchen stops feeling like a space you are proud of.

Summer is when it becomes visible again. More time at home. More family meals. More moments where the kitchen is the center of the house and the wear is impossible to ignore.

Kitchen remodeling does not have to mean a full gut renovation. Sometimes it is a new tile floor and a redesigned backsplash. Sometimes it is a complete refresh with new finishes throughout. The design team at Kadosh Flooring Store in Orlando starts with what you have and shows you what is possible.

In-house designers. Licensed installation crew. One team from concept to final grout clean-up.

Kadosh serves Orlando, Lake Nona, Dr. Phillips, Winter Park, and Greater Central Florida. The team brings samples to your home. You see every option in your own light.

Call our Orlando office to book your free consultation. 🍳

The gap between a porcelain tile job that photographs beautifully and one that lasts twenty years is installation.

Large-format porcelain is unforgiving. Off-level subfloors crack it. Improper thinset coverage causes hollow spots. Wrong grout for the joint width starts failing in year two. These are not rare problems. They are the result of speed over craft.

At Kadosh Flooring Store in Orlando, tile floor installation starts with the subfloor. Leveled, moisture-tested, and confirmed ready before the first tile is placed. The design team selects tile, grout, and layout pattern together. Laser tools confirm alignment across every run.

The result is a floor with tight, consistent grout lines, zero hollow tiles, and finish work that holds up to Florida living for decades.

Porcelain tile installation across Greater Orlando. Lake Nona. Dr. Phillips. Windermere. Kissimmee. Written quote before any work begins.

If your floors have been on the list long enough, this is the call to make.

Call our Orlando office to schedule a free in-home estimate. ✨

The number one reason Orlando homeowners delay a bathroom remodel is cost uncertainty. Not the cost itself. The uncertainty about what it will actually be once the work starts.

Here is what drives bathroom remodeling costs in Central Florida and what you can control:

Scope definition before demolition. The biggest cost overruns happen when scope expands mid-project. The team at Kadosh locks scope, materials, and pricing in writing before any work begins. No surprises.

Material selection flexibility. Porcelain tile ranges from builder-grade to premium large-format. Both perform. The price difference is real but manageable with the right guidance from an in-house design team.

One-crew execution. Hiring separate contractors for plumbing, tile, and vanity multiplies coordination cost and risk. One licensed crew handling everything typically lowers the total project cost.

Financing through Synchrony Bank is available for qualifying projects. Flexible terms. Some plans include 0% APR promotional options.

Nine years serving Greater Orlando. Written quote guaranteed.

Call our Orlando office to schedule your free in-home estimate and get a real number before you commit. 🏡

Is laminate flooring still worth considering?

The answer depends on what you need it to do.

Modern laminate has advanced significantly. Today's high-quality laminate features AC3 and AC4 wear ratings, realistic wood-grain texture with genuine depth, and core construction that resists moisture far better than older generations.

Where laminate performs well: bedrooms, home offices, and low-to-moderate-traffic living areas in air-conditioned Central Florida homes. It delivers the wood-floor aesthetic at a price point that leaves room for other investments in your renovation.

Where LVP outperforms it: areas with direct moisture exposure such as bathrooms, laundry rooms, and kitchen sink areas. For those spaces, luxury vinyl plank is the smarter long-term choice.

The design team at Kadosh Flooring Store in Orlando helps you choose the right material for each room. Subfloor leveled, planks acclimated to your home's humidity, trim work finished tight against every baseboard.

Kadosh serves Orlando, Kissimmee, Oviedo, Sanford, and Greater Central Florida.

Call our Orlando office to schedule your free in-home consultation.

After nine years installing flooring across Greater Orlando, the team at Kadosh Flooring Store has learned one thing that never changes.

Homeowners do not remember the price. They remember how the floor feels six years after installation.

Engineered hardwood done right starts before the floor is ever delivered. Moisture testing the subfloor. Leveling any low spots. Acclimating the planks to your specific home's humidity for the manufacturer-required period. None of these steps are optional. All of them get skipped by crews working for speed.

At Kadosh, every engineered hardwood installation follows the full process. The design team helps select tone, plank width, and finish based on your specific rooms and light. The licensed installation crew handles subfloor, installation, trim, baseboard, and final clean-up.

The result is a floor that moves correctly with Florida's seasons and can be refinished in ten years when the next chapter of your family arrives.

Over 600 homes in Central Florida. Written quote. No surprises.

Call our Orlando office to schedule your free consultation. 🌿

At Kadosh Flooring Store, the team has worked in neighborhoods across Greater Orlando. Lake Nona. Dr. Phillips. Winter Park. Windermere. Kissimmee. Sanford. Oviedo. Each community has its own character. Every home gets the same level of attention.

If you have been thinking about what your home could look like, this is a good moment to start that conversation.

There is a version of this home that has a kitchen worth cooking in.

Not the one with the dated tile and the grout that has been gray for too long. The one where the floor makes a statement, the backsplash was chosen with intention, and the whole space feels like it belongs to this decade.

Father's Day is a moment to think about the rooms where a family actually lives. Kitchens top that list in Central Florida homes.

At Kadosh Flooring Store, kitchen remodeling covers what matters most: tile floor installation, kitchen backsplash design and installation, baseboard and trim work, and the finish details that transform a functional room into one worth gathering in.

One licensed crew. In-house designers who coordinate every material selection before work begins. 3D pre-demolition planning. Written quote with no surprises.

Summer schedules are filling. The team at Kadosh books consultations in advance and the in-home visit is always free.

When does a bathroom go from needs attention to needs a remodel?

Most Orlando homeowners discover the answer too late, when the water damage is already behind the wall.

Here are the signals to watch for. Grout that cracks and returns no matter how many times it is repaired. Caulk lines around the tub or shower that separate regularly. Floor tiles that click or rock when you step on them. Mildew that reappears within days of cleaning. These are not cosmetic problems. They are early warnings.

In Central Florida's humidity, bathroom moisture issues escalate faster than in drier climates. A small gap in grout lets water into the subfloor. Subfloor damage adds significant cost to a renovation that would have been straightforward at an earlier stage.

The team at Kadosh Flooring Store in Orlando has remodeled bathrooms at every stage from cosmetic refresh to full gut renovation. Early intervention is almost always the less expensive path.

The consultation is free. The team comes to your home, assesses the situation, and provides a written scope with pricing before any decision is made.

Call our Orlando office to schedule your assessment. 🚿

Most flooring looks good in the showroom. The real test comes six months later in a Florida home with kids and pets.

Luxury vinyl plank installation at Kadosh Flooring Store in Orlando follows a process that most installers skip because it takes more time:

Subfloor leveling before the first plank goes down. Even minor height variations cause vinyl to buckle over time. The team corrects every low spot before installation begins.

Plank acclimation to your home's climate. LVP expands and contracts with temperature. Acclimation in your specific space before installation prevents gaps and compression issues down the road.

Tight baseboard and shoe molding finish. The difference between a floor that looks installed and one that looks built-in is the trim work.

Waterproof core. Scratch-resistant surface. Pet-proof in the ways that matter for Central Florida family life.

Kadosh serves Greater Orlando and the surrounding region. Lake Nona. Dr. Phillips. Oviedo. Sanford. Clermont. Daytona Beach area. Nine years installing flooring that holds up to real life.

Call our Orlando office for a free in-home estimate. 🐾

Porcelain tile in an Orlando showroom all looks similar. On your floor three years from now, the differences become impossible to ignore.

Here is what actually matters when selecting tile for Central Florida homes:

PEI rating. The Porcelain Enamel Institute rating tells you how much foot-traffic wear a tile can handle. A PEI 3 tile in a high-traffic kitchen is a three-year decision. A PEI 4 or 5 is a lifetime one.

Water absorption rate. True porcelain has less than 0.5% absorption. Many porcelain-look tiles sold at big box retailers are ceramic with a porcelain finish. In Florida's humidity, this distinction matters for long-term performance.

Rectified versus non-rectified edges. Rectified tile allows tighter grout lines and a more seamless large-format look. Non-rectified requires wider joints that collect more grime over time.

At Kadosh Flooring Store in Orlando, the design team explains exactly what each tile specification means for your specific installation. No upselling. No guessing. The right tile for the right room.

Synchrony Bank financing available for qualifying projects.

Call our Orlando office for a free in-home design consultation. 🏡

The most common misconception about laminate flooring is that it means compromise.

It does not. It means choosing the right product for the right space.

Today's premium laminate offers AC4 wear ratings, 12mm core thickness, and realistic grain texture that reads as hardwood from any angle in the room. Installed correctly in the right application, it lasts fifteen to twenty years without refinishing.

The word "correctly" is doing significant work in that sentence.

At Kadosh Flooring Store in Orlando, the laminate installation process starts with the subfloor. Leveled, confirmed flat, moisture readings taken. Planks are acclimated to your specific room. Installation follows with proper underlayment selection and tight trim work at every edge.

Nine years of flooring installations across Greater Orlando means the team at Kadosh has seen what fails and what holds. The answer is almost always installation quality, not product quality.

Written quote before any work begins. Synchrony Bank financing available.

Call our Orlando office to schedule a free in-home consultation.

The number one hesitation homeowners in Orlando have before starting a kitchen remodel is not cost. It is time.

"How long will my kitchen be unavailable?" is the question asked in nearly every consultation. Here is the honest answer:

Scope determines timeline. A kitchen backsplash and tile floor replacement typically takes five to seven business days from start to final grout cure. A full kitchen renovation including layout changes, new tile throughout, and finish work runs two to four weeks depending on material lead times and permit requirements.

One-crew execution compresses timelines. When demolition, plumbing, tile, and finish work all belong to the same licensed crew working daily, there are no delays waiting for the next contractor to show up.

Pre-demolition planning matters. At Kadosh Flooring Store, materials are confirmed and delivered before the first wall comes down. No mid-project material waits. No surprises.

Written scope of work and estimated timeline included with every quote.

Kadosh serves Greater Orlando and Central Florida. Consultations are free and happen in your home.

Call our Orlando office to start the conversation. 🏡

Grout lines tell the truth.

A tile floor installed with care has joints that are perfectly uniform from the first tile to the last, whether the room is ten feet or forty feet long. A floor installed with speed shows inconsistency that becomes more visible with every passing year.

At Kadosh Flooring Store in Orlando, every tile floor installation uses laser measurement tools to confirm alignment across every run. Before the first tile is placed, the room is mapped, reference lines are set, and the pattern is planned for visual balance at every doorway and transition.

Before any project begins, the design team photographs and measures every surface. 3D pre-demolition planning means the floor, wall tile, and trim work are coordinated before ordering. Material waste is minimized. The result matches the design exactly.

This level of process is what separates a porcelain tile floor that looks like a renovation from one that looks like the house was always built this way.

Nine years installing tile across Greater Orlando. Serving Windermere, Dr. Phillips, Lake Nona, Winter Park, and the greater Central Florida region.

Call our Orlando office for a free in-home estimate. ✨

Nine years of engineered hardwood installations across Greater Orlando has produced a clear picture of what works in this climate.

Here is what the team at Kadosh Flooring Store has learned from 600 plus Central Florida projects:

Humidity management starts at the subfloor. Moisture readings before installation are not optional. Florida's year-round humidity means subfloor conditions vary significantly by season. Skipping the test creates floors that move unexpectedly after installation.

Plank width and room proportion matter. Wide-plank formats above five inches photograph beautifully in open-plan living areas. Narrower planks suit transitional hallways and smaller rooms. The design team matches the two intentionally.

Acclimation time is real. Engineered hardwood needs 48 to 72 hours inside your specific home before installation. Crews that skip acclimation are optimizing for their schedule, not your floor.

Every Kadosh installation includes documentation of subfloor testing, acclimation, and manufacturer warranty compliance.

Call our Orlando office for a free in-home consultation. 🌿
